texto: Exactly. We don't belong here. They're not staring out of disdain, Jordan; they're staring out of jealousy. We don't have to be a part of the horrible modelling industry. You don't have to watch what you eat and I don't have to worry about how many zits are on my face. We can be whoever the fuck we want, a type of liberty that a majority of people crave.
autor: Cameron How to be a Girl
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cameron How to be a Girl sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “Exactly. We don't belong here. They're not staring out of disdain, Jordan; they're staring out of…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a autoestima, being-yourself, fitting-in, útil em momentos de fitting-in e liberty.
